WPEPlatform

API Version: 2.0

Library Version: 2.52.1

Type
Display
Virtual methods
connect create_gamepad_manager create_input_method_context create_toplevel create_view get_clipboard get_drm_device get_egl_display get_keymap get_n_screens get_preferred_buffer_formats get_screen use_explicit_sync

Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Virtual Method

WPEPlatformDisplaycreate_toplevel

Declaration [src] 

WPEToplevel*
create_toplevel (
  WPEDisplay* display,
  guint max_views
)

Description [src]

Create a new WPEToplevel on display with max_views allowed. The parameter max_views will be ignored if display doesn’t support multiple views per toplevel. This function returns NULL if the platform implementation doesn’t support explicit creation of WPEToplevel.

Parameters

max_views

Type: guint

The maximum number of views allowed, or 0 for no limit.

Return value

Type: WPEToplevel

A new WPEToplevel or NULL if not supported.

The caller of the function takes ownership of the data, and is responsible for freeing it.
The return value can be NULL.
